caption:
Most owners track cost per lead. Almost none track cost per booked job.

Those are two different numbers. Say your cost per lead runs $40 and you close 10% of leads. That puts your cost per booked job at $400. Lift close rate to 25% on the same leads and that job now costs $160 to book.

Ad spend isn't the leak. Slow follow-up after the click is.

The Ad ROI Calculator on our free tools page runs this math on your real numbers. Plug in spend and lead volume and see where the budget works and where it doesn't.

DM TOOLS

#LeadGeneration #ServiceBusiness #HomeServices #MarketingROI #SmallBusinessMarketing
rationale: Fills the under-served Offers/Lead Magnets slot with the one published free tool this account hasn't solo-featured yet, using an image promo card since a single clear offer card converts fastest for a straightforward lead-magnet push.
